It seems the solution is building but it's only processing the .sln metaproject — the individual projects (Core, Api, Web, Tests) aren't actually getting built. The warning "Unable to find a project to restore" suggests something is wrong with the solution file format.

Let me look more carefully at the solution file. The GUIDs in the solution file look non-standard. Let me check.

The solution file uses non-standard GUIDs like `{C1111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111}`, etc. But the project type GUID `{FAE04EC0-301F-11D3-BF4B-00C04F79EFBC}` is the standard C# project type GUID.


I'm noticing the GlobalSection is missing project configuration mappings entirely — there are solution configurations defined but no ProjectConfigurationPlatforms section to tie the projects to them. That's why nothing's actually building. Let me try compiling each project directly to see if they work in isolation.
